title: Visual Agent Intelligence DAG — Lane 1
consumer_purpose: Transform the session timeline into a visual, interactive decision tree with timeline scrubber, agent coloring, session checkpoints, inline fork, and live agent activity feed
claim_atoms: TimelineScrubber component renders above timeline showing turn segments colored by agent
Checkpoint row type added to timeline data model and renders diamond icons
AssistantPart rows show colored left border from messageAgentColor
TurnDivider rows get inline Fork button on hover using DialogFork
ActivityFeed shows agent heartbeat badges with switching animation
SessionViz context tracks agent changes with color mapping
All 9 existing row types continue rendering correctly
content:
## Plan: Visual Agent Intelligence DAG

### Files to modify:
1. `packages/app/src/pages/session/message-timeline.data.ts` — ADD Checkpoint row type
2. `packages/app/src/pages/session/timeline-scrubber.tsx` — NEW scrubber component
3. `packages/app/src/pages/session/message-timeline.tsx` — EVOLVE with fork, agent coloring, checkpoint rendering, scrubber integration
4. `packages/app/src/context/session-viz.tsx` — EVOLVE with agent heartbeat tracking
5. `packages/app/src/components/session-viz/activity-feed.tsx` — EVOLVE with agent badges
6. `packages/app/src/components/session-viz/viz-panel.tsx` — EVOLVE with scrubber wiring

### Implementation Order:
A. Add Checkpoint to TimelineRow types + constructMessageRows  
B. Build TimelineScrubber component  
C. Wire fork buttons into TurnDivider and add agent coloring  
D. Add Checkpoint rendering to message-timeline  
E. Add agent heartbeat tracking to session-viz context  
F. Enhance activity-feed with agent badges and switching animation  
G. Wire scrubber into viz-panel
